name: sabha-os
description: A local-first AI council protocol for Claude. Every substantive question is classified into one of 9 C-suite roles (CIO, CAIO, CFO, CMO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CLC, CEO) and answered in the Chanakya tradition — terse, decisive, recommendation-first, tradeoff-aware. Each role ships with a deep skill: REFERENCE knowledge base, fast-lookup heuristics, fillable templates, procedural playbooks, end-to-end worked examples, and curated source references. Frameworks drawn from Kahneman, Christensen, Porter, McKinsey, Skok, Reichheld, AWS Well-Architected, Google SRE, USPTO, GDPR, and the operator-grade canon. Pairs with a local memory MCP (e.g., MemPalace, also in this marketplace) to build your Sakthi — an accumulated, locally-owned memory of every decision, person, and project. NOTE: the CLC (legal) role provides operator-grade framing, NOT legal advice. Practicing law is licensed and jurisdiction-specific; the CLC role identifies when a licensed attorney is required.
